name: Culture Amp
description: Culture Amp is an employee engagement and performance management platform that helps organizations collect employee feedback, run performance reviews, and drive workplace culture improvements.

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to Culture Amp as an Account Administrator
2. Open Settings > Account > API
3. Click to create a new API credential
4. Select the 'employees-read' scope (and 'employee-demographics-read' if needed)
5. Copy the Client ID and Client Secret
6. Enter them below

Note: The entity ID used in the OAuth scope (8ed17dce-...) is a Culture Amp platform-level constant for the production API, shared by all customers. It is NOT tenant-specific. See https://docs.api.cultureamp.com/docs/customer-guide-authorization-scopes for details.

credentialFields.label: Client ID
credentialFields.helpText: Your Culture Amp API credential Client ID. Found in Culture Amp Settings > Account > API.

credentialFields.label: Client Secret
credentialFields.helpText: Your Culture Amp API credential Client Secret. Found in Culture Amp Settings > Account > API.

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Lists all users/members in Culture Amp with their names, emails, and identifiers to verify employee access controls.

checks.name: App Availability
checks.description: Verifies that the Culture Amp API is accessible and the provided credentials are valid by authenticating and making a test API call.
